step_rationale: Intermediate filament in platelet cytoskeleton; released during activation.
mechanism: Vimentin is released from the platelet cytoskeleton during activation and reflects both platelet involvement and vascular inflammation.

references.title: Proteomic analysis of plasma proteins from patients with cardiac rupture after acute myocardial infarction using TMT-based quantitative proteomics approach.
Proteomic insights into the associations between obesity, lifestyle factors, and coronary artery disease.
Oxidized LDL induces vimentin secretion by macrophages and contributes to atherosclerotic inflammation.
Proteomic changes related to "bewildered" circulating platelets in the acute coronary syndrome.
